description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a beaver, featuring a rounded brown body with a large, prominent pair of light gray cheeks and two small white buck teeth protruding from its mouth. The toy has small, rounded ears on top of its head and expressive, circular yellow eyes with black pupils. Its arms are short and positioned forward, as if holding something, while its legs are spread apart, ending in black feet. The beaver's most distinctive feature is its wide, flat, black tail extending from the back. The surface appears soft and fuzzy, typical of plush toys, with stitched details for the mouth and nose. This toy would likely be found in parks, playgrounds, or urban recreational areas as a decorative or playful object.
description: A soft, plush beaver stuffed toy with large gray cheeks, yellow eyes, and a wide black tail. Its rounded body and stitched details give it a friendly, cartoonish appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the beaver's face, large gray cheeks, yellow eyes, buck teeth, and forward-facing arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded body, protruding cheeks, and the full length of the flat black tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and the wide, flat tail extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the cheeks, arms, and tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a small, slightly open mouth showing two white buck teeth. The cheeks are puffed out, giving a gentle and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms bent forward and legs spread apart, the head is held high and the tail extends straight back.
